name: file-io
notes: File I/O is runtime-owned and now routes file, directory, symlink, stat, chmod/chown, read, write, scan, and rename operations through libuv's filesystem API. Public synchronous names remain simple. async_* file APIs are intentionally reserved for a later explicit runtime scheduling layer, without introducing an async language keyword in 0.5.0. Shell/archive/scp/ssh helpers remain command-backed utility wrappers for now.
